org.apache.dubbo.rpc.cluster.directory

类 AbstractDirectory<T>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.rpc.cluster.directory.AbstractDirectory<T>
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Node, Directory<T>
    直接已知子类:
    DynamicDirectory, StaticDirectory

    public abstract class AbstractDirectory<T>
extends Object
implements Directory<T>
    Abstract implementation of Directory: Invoker list returned from this Directory's list method have been filtered by Routers

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
